variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 10881 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 10881 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 10881 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 216.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 146.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 134.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 735.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 712.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P129472 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10881
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P129472 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10881
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P129472 Air Filter, Primary Konepac is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary konepac applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 22 835 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10881
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 22 835 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10881
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 146.0 mm, Dimension C: 132.0 mm, Dimension D: 220.0 mm, Dimension H: 737.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF931M Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10881
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF931M Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10881
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF931M axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
